extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the “Against” rows—criminal proceedings of 2 against the Company, 1 against Promoters and 1 against Subsidiaries; statutory/regulatory proceedings of 9 against the Company and 5 against Subsidiaries; and tax proceedings of 22 against the Company and 19 against Subsidiaries. For the aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries, I used the stated aggregate amounts of ₹721.09 million and ₹879.52 million, respectively, excluding all “By” rows and promoter/director personal matters; the total is ₹1,600.61 million, converted to ₹160.061 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is dated March 31, 2023 and lists components in ₹ million but does not state a Total row, so no total is extracted rather than re-summing line items. Company-wide customer concentration for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2023, is stated as 17.91% for the top five and 27.69% for the top ten, measured against consolidated revenue from operations. The source monetary unit is ₹ million; conversion to crore is by dividing by 10 (₹1,600.61 million ÷ 10 = ₹160.061 crore).
